decisions.rationale: Observation resolves to its own base_record_id (project_34th-street-2011) which matches an existing registry record with identical provenance (same source_id 201103_34th_cac_summary), identical payload (same project_name '34th Street Project', same description, same project_type, same status, same borough). Per the rule, when the closest match is the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is 'new' — never link to your own base_record_id.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 34th Street Project - improvements on 34th Street, including offset bus lanes, bus bulbs and sidewalk extensions, expanded loading zones, off-board fare collection on M16 and M34 bus routes, additional bus lane camera enforcement.
